name: GAMERS!
overview: Keita Amano is a perfectly mediocre loner with no particular distinguishing features other than his love for games. One day, his school's prettiest girl and Gamer Club President Karen Tendo suddenly calls out to him. That moment changes Keita's life forever, as he now finds himself in the midst of a romcom with beautiful girl gamers... or, well, that's how it usually goes. Not with him, however.

trailers.title: Opening | GAMERS! - Hisako Kanemoto, Manaka Iwami, Rumi Ōkubo
